basic_details.job_title: ICMR-NIHR Project Research Scientist-II Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR - National Institute of Health Research
basic_details.short_information: ICMR - National Institute of Health Research (ICMR-NIHR) Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website icmr.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICMR-NIHR Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be admissible in respect of SC / ST / OBC candidates, retrenched Government Employees, Departmental Candidates (including projects) and Ex-service men etc. in accordance with the instructions issued by the Central Government / DoPT / ICMR from time to time.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics / Life Sciences with three years post-qualification experience in the relevant subject OR Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics/Life Sciences with PhD in the relevant subject
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics / Life Sciences with three years post-qualification experience in the relevant subject OR Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics/Life Sciences with PhD in the relevant subject.

selection_process: Walk-in-interview / Written Test Skill Test (if applicable) Interview

content_sections.heading: ICMR-NIHR Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.icmr_national_institute_of_health_resear: Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics / Life Sciences with three years post-qualification experience in the relevant subject OR Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics/Life Sciences with PhD in the relevant subject

content_sections.heading: ICMR-NIHR Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ICMR-NIHR Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ICMR-NIHR Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICMR-NIHR Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics / Life Sciences with three years post-qualification experience in the relevant subject OR Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biomedical Sciences / Genetics/Life Sciences with PhD in the relevant subject.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age relaxation will be admissible in respect of SC / ST / OBC candidates, retrenched Government Employees, Departmental Candidates (including projects) and Ex-service men etc. in accordance with the instructions issued by the Central Government / DoPT / ICMR from time to time.

content_sections.heading: ICMR-NIHR Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Selection Process
content_sections.text: Walk-in-interview / Written Test Skill Test (if applicable) Interview

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: ICMR-NIHR Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the ICMR-NIHR recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for this post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview directly.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 08 July 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: A Post Graduate Degree in Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Microbiology, Biomedical Sciences, Genetics, or Life Sciences with three years of relevant experience or a PhD in the relevant subject is required.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for this position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this position is 40 years, with applicable age relaxations for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Project Research Scientist-II (Non-Medical) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 67,000/- plus HRA per month.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST categories.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in-interview/Written Test, and potentially a Skill Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted in Jodhpur, Rajasthan. Please refer to the official notification for the exact venue details.
